name: Shareholders' Agreement Summary
description: Produces a structured summary of a shareholders' agreement — parties, share capital, board and governance, reserved matters, transfer restrictions, drag/tag rights, exit provisions, and unusual terms — with clause citations, delivered as a Word document.
promptTemplate:
Prepare a structured legal summary of the following shareholders' agreement.

Matter: {{description}}

Documents provided: {{document}}

Cover, in order:
1. Parties and structure — the company, each shareholder (or shareholder class) and their stake, and any parent, nominee, or joint-venture arrangements.
2. Share capital — classes of shares and the rights attaching to each (voting, dividend, liquidation preference), anti-dilution protection, and any pre-emption rights on new issues.
3. Board and governance — board size and composition, appointment/removal rights, quorum and voting rules, chair and casting vote, committees, and information/reporting rights.
4. Reserved matters — the matters requiring shareholder or investor consent, the consent threshold for each, and whose consent is required.
5. Transfer restrictions — lock-ups, prohibited transferees, rights of first refusal or first offer, pre-emption on transfer, and permitted-transferee carve-outs.
6. Drag-along and tag-along — trigger thresholds, price and terms protections, and mechanics for each.
7. Exit — IPO and sale provisions, put/call options, default and compulsory-transfer events, deadlock resolution, and valuation mechanics.
8. Unusual or off-market terms — anything one-sided, missing, or out of step with market practice for an agreement of this kind, with a short explanation of why it matters.

Cite the clause or schedule reference for every point summarised. Deliver the summary using the docx_generate tool as a Word document, one section per topic above, and report the output file path.
